01A.product_summary: ROAV by ANKER DASHCAM C1 (Model R2110) is a black dash cam with built-in Wi-Fi, app support, Sony Exmor IMX323 sensor, FHD 1080P recording at 30FPS, 145° wide-angle coverage, G-sensor collision detection, WDR superior night vision, a 2.4-inch illuminated screen, F1.8 lens with 6 glass elements, and a 470mAh Li-polymer battery. Package includes the dash cam, Anker 2-port USB car charger, Micro-USB charging cable, 32GB card, and owner's manual.

image_views.front_3q_left: Driver-facing image showing a front-left three-quarter view with the screen visible and the left-side cylindrical hinge housing exposed.
image_views.front_3q_right: Road-facing image showing a front-right three-quarter view with the camera lens visible and the top mounting plate exposed.

visual_identity.materials: Matte and semi-gloss plastic with a glass lens element

component_positions.display_screen: Centered on the front face in the driver-facing view
component_positions.brand_marking: Above the display on the upper front face
component_positions.control_buttons: Arranged horizontally below the display on the front face
component_positions.camera_lens: Located on the lower front area in the road-facing view and protruding outward
component_positions.mounting_plate: Mounted on the top of the body and angled slightly upward/backward
component_positions.side_hinge_housing: Runs vertically along one side of the body
component_positions.circular_side_cap: Centered on the outer face of the side hinge housing
component_positions.accent_strip: Near the upper end of the side hinge housing
component_positions.mounting_base: Positioned underneath the main body near the center

lighting_profile.shadow_behavior: Minimal soft shadows beneath and around the product
lighting_profile.reflection_style: Mild controlled reflections on plastic surfaces and stronger reflections on the lens glass

camera_profile.camera_angle: Three-quarter product view from slightly above front level
camera_profile.lens_style: Standard product photography with low distortion

product_geometry.shape_description: Compact asymmetrical body with a rectangular main housing, a cylindrical side hinge structure, a protruding front lens module, and a top mounting plate
product_geometry.proportions: Taller than wide with a compact body and moderate depth created by the lens and mount
product_geometry.relative_dimensions: Main housing occupies most of the visible mass, side hinge housing spans nearly full height, lens module protrudes from the lower front, and mounting plate is broad relative to the top surface

02.amazon_product_title: ROAV by ANKER DASHCAM C1 Dash Cam R2110 Built In WiFi 1080P FHD Sony Exmor IMX323 Sensor 145 Degree Wide Angle WDR Night Vision G Sensor 32GB Card Black

amazon_bullet_points: CLEAR 1080P RECORDING — Captures Full HD 1920×1080 video at 30FPS with a SONY Exmor IMX323 sensor for detailed everyday driving footage.
WIDE ROAD COVERAGE — 145° wide-angle lens records a broad view of the road to cover multiple lanes of traffic in a single frame.
ENHANCED NIGHT VISIBILITY — WDR Superior Night Vision with Nighthawk Vision™ helps improve low-light recording and license plate clarity at night.
AUTOMATIC INCIDENT RECORDING — Built-in G-sensor detects sudden stops or collisions and starts recording to capture important driving events.
EASY WIFI APP ACCESS — Built-in Wi-Fi connects to the Roav app so you can review, download, and share videos from your dash cam.

04.amazon_product_description:
The ROAV by ANKER DASHCAM C1 is a compact dash cam designed for drivers who want dependable video recording for daily commutes, road trips, and general on-road awareness. It records in Full HD 1080P at 30FPS using a SONY Exmor IMX323 sensor, helping capture clear driving footage in a wide range of conditions. The 145° wide-angle lens provides broad road coverage, making it useful for recording multiple lanes of traffic in a single view.

For low-light driving, WDR Superior Night Vision and Nighthawk Vision™ work with the F1.8 lens and 6-glass-element design to support clearer nighttime footage. The built-in G-sensor automatically starts recording when sudden stops or collisions occur, helping preserve important moments when they matter most.

Built-in Wi-Fi adds everyday convenience by connecting the dash cam to the Roav app, so users can review, download, and share videos directly from their phone. The illuminated 2.4-inch screen also makes on-device viewing and operation straightforward. With a Novatek NT96658 chipset, operating range of 14°F to 149°F, and a 470mAh Li-polymer battery, the DASHCAM C1 is built for regular in-car use. The package includes the DashCam C1, Anker 2-port USB car charger, Micro-USB charging cable, 32GB card, and owner's manual.

amazon_aplus_content.seller_or_brand_story: ROAV by ANKER designs practical in-car technology focused on clear recording, straightforward operation, and dependable daily use. The DASHCAM C1 reflects that approach with Full HD video, built-in Wi-Fi app connectivity, a wide-angle lens, and included essentials for getting started.

feature_section_1.headline: Clear Full HD Video for Everyday Driving
feature_section_1.supporting_text: The DASHCAM C1 records in 1080P at 30FPS with a SONY Exmor IMX323 sensor to capture detailed footage during commutes, road trips, and routine driving. It is built to provide a clear visual record when you want to review moments on the road.

feature_section_2.headline: Wide Coverage for a Broader View Ahead
feature_section_2.supporting_text: A 145° wide-angle lens helps record more of the road in a single frame, making it useful for viewing multiple lanes of traffic. This broader perspective supports better situational coverage without adding complexity to daily use.

feature_section_3.headline: Night Vision Support When Light Conditions Change
feature_section_3.supporting_text: WDR Superior Night Vision, Nighthawk Vision™, and the F1.8 6-glass-element lens work together to support clearer low-light recording. This helps the camera stay effective for nighttime driving and other dim road conditions.

feature_section_4.headline: Connected and Ready When It Matters
feature_section_4.supporting_text: Built-in Wi-Fi connects to the Roav app so you can review, download, and share videos from your phone. The G-sensor can automatically start recording during sudden stops or collisions, while the 2.4-inch screen and included 32GB card add everyday convenience.

customer_faq.question: What is this dash cam designed to do?
customer_faq.answer: It is a dashboard camera for recording driving footage in Full HD 1080P at 30FPS. It is intended to capture the road ahead during daily driving, commutes, and road trips.

customer_faq.question: Does this dash cam connect to a phone or app?
customer_faq.answer: Yes. It has built-in Wi-Fi and works with the Roav Dashcam app, which is available on the App Store and Google Play for reviewing, downloading, and sharing videos.

customer_faq.question: How wide is the camera view?
customer_faq.answer: The camera has a 145° wide-angle view. According to the product information, this viewing angle can record up to 4 lanes of traffic in a single view.

customer_faq.question: Does it record automatically if there is a sudden stop or collision?
customer_faq.answer: Yes. It includes a G-sensor, also described as a gravity sensor, that monitors sudden stops or collisions and starts recording automatically when those events occur.

customer_faq.question: What comes in the box?
customer_faq.answer: The package includes the DashCam C1, an Anker 2-Port USB car charger, a Micro-USB charging cable, a 32GB card, and the owner's manual.

social_media_posts.caption_title: Missed details after a sudden stop?
social_media_posts.caption_text: When something happens on the road, clear footage matters. The ROAV by ANKER DASHCAM C1 records in 1080P and uses a built-in G-sensor to start recording during sudden stops or collisions. Built-in Wi-Fi also lets you review and download video through the Roav app.

social_media_posts.caption_title: Driving at night with low visibility?
social_media_posts.caption_text: Low-light driving can make it harder to capture important details. DASHCAM C1 combines a SONY Exmor IMX323 sensor, WDR Superior Night Vision, and an F1.8 lens with 6 glass elements to support clearer nighttime footage. The 145° wide-angle view helps cover more of the road ahead.

social_media_posts.caption_title: Need an easy dash cam for daily driving?
social_media_posts.caption_text: For commutes, road trips, and everyday driving, DASHCAM C1 keeps things straightforward. It records in Full HD 1080P, includes a 32GB card, features an illuminated 2.4-inch screen, and connects to the Roav app over built-in Wi-Fi for quick video review and sharing.

source_payload.raw_text:
Analyze the below product information.  **Structure and “Lock in” the product data** so we can use it in the next step to build an optimized Amazon listing for this product.

**Product Name:** DASHCAM C1
**Brand:** ROAV by ANKER 
**Color:** Black
**Model:** R2110

**Features and Specifications:** found on actual product label/package
- Built-In Wi-Fi With App Support
- ANKER 2-Port USB Car Charger
- Exmor IMX 323 Advanced SONY Sensor
- FHD 1080P Crystal-Clear Definition
- SD Free 32GB Card
- SONY Exmor IMX323 sensor has Nighthawk Vision™ to clearly capture speeding license plates — especially at night.
- 145° wide-angle view simultaneously records up to 4 lanes of traffic.
- Gravity sensor monitors and instantly starts recording when sudden stops or collisions occur.
- Connect to DashCam's Wi-Fi to seamlessly review, download, and share videos via the Roav app.
- Chipset: Novatek NT96658 
- Wi-Fi: Built-in 
- Sensor: SONY Exmor IMX323 (1/2.9", 2.8µ pixel) 
- Motion Sensor: G-Sensor 
- Video: 1080P 30FPS (1920×1080) 
- Night Vision: WDR Superior Night Vision 
- Operating Temperatures: 14°F to 149°F 
- Screen: Illuminated 2.4" 
- Screen Lens: F1.8 with 6 high-quality glass elements and 145° viewing angle 
- Battery: 470mAh Li-polymer battery capable of operating in high and low temperatures.
- Download the Roav Dashcam app from the App Store or Google Play.

**Box Contents:**
- DashCam C1
- Anker 2-Port USB car charger
- Micro-USB charging cable
- 32GB card
- Owner's Manual
